ddls:
CREATE TABLE "frame_sizes" (
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each frame size */,
  "size_name" TEXT /* Name of the frame size (e.g., X-Small, Small, Medium, Large, X-Large) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the frame size */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the frame size was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the frame size was last updated */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the frame size is currently active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "frame_specifications" (
  "spec_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each specification */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* ID of the frame size this specification belongs to */,
  "seat_tube" REAL /* Measurement for the seat tube */,
  "top_tube" REAL /* Measurement for the top tube */,
  "head_tube" REAL /* Measurement for the head tube */,
  "head_angle" REAL /* Measurement for the head angle */,
  "seat_angle" REAL /* Measurement for the seat angle */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the specification was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the specification was last updated */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the specification */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the specification */,
  "material" TEXT /* Type of material used for the frame */,
  "color" TEXT /* Color of the frame */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the frame in grams */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("spec_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_frame_specifications_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES frame_sizes ("size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each bicycle model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the bicycle model */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the bicycle model */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the model was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the model was last updated */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the model is currently active */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the bicycle (e.g., Road, Mountain, Hybrid) */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the bicycle model */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_sizes" (
  "model_size_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the mapping of a frame size to a model */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the bicycle model */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* ID of the frame size */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the mapping was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the mapping was last updated */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the mapping is currently active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_sizes_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES frame_sizes ("size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_sizes_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "specification_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each change in specification */,
  "spec_id" INTEGER /* ID of the specification that was changed */,
  "changed_date" TEXT /* Date when the specification was changed */,
  "previous_value" TEXT /* Previous value of the specification */,
  "new_value" TEXT /* New value of the specification */,
  "changed_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the change */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for the change */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_specification_history_spec_id FOREIGN KEY ("spec_id") REFERENCES frame_specifications ("spec_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_specification_history_changed_by FOREIGN KEY ("changed_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., designer, engineer, admin) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was last updated */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the user account is active */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department to which the user belongs (e.g., Design, Manufacturing, Sales) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "specification_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "spec_id" INTEGER /* ID of the specification being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the specification */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the specification was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the access event is active */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access occurred */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_specification_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_specification_access_spec_id FOREIGN KEY ("spec_id") REFERENCES frame_specifications ("spec_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "specification_reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "spec_id" INTEGER /* ID of the specification being reviewed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who provided the review */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date when the review was submitted */,
  "feedback" TEXT /* Feedback provided in the review */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the user (1-5) */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the review is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_specification_reviews_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_specification_reviews_spec_id FOREIGN KEY ("spec_id") REFERENCES frame_specifications ("spec_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory" (
  "inventory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inventory item */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the bicycle model */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* ID of the frame size */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of frames in stock */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the inventory record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the inventory record was last updated */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the inventory record is active */,
  "last_stock_check" TEXT /* Date and time when the last stock check was performed */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location where the inventory is stored */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inventory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES frame_sizes ("size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sales" (
  "sale_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sale */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the bicycle model */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* ID of the frame size */,
  "quantity_sold" INTEGER /* Number of frames sold */,
  "sale_date" TEXT /* Date when the sale occurred */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the sale record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the sale record was last updated */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the sale record is active */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who made the purchase */,
  "sales_person_id" INTEGER /* ID of the salesperson who facilitated the sale */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sale_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_sales_person_id FOREIGN KEY ("sales_person_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES frame_sizes ("size_id")
)
